name: Ketamine
description: Rarraba maganin sa barci yana ba da analgesia, kwantar da hankali, da amnesia yayin da ake kiyaye motsin iska da kwanciyar hankali na hemodynamic. An fi son analgesic a cikin TCCC -- yana kula da BP sabanin opioids. Har ila yau ana amfani da shi don kwantar da hankali da kuma RSI.
dose: Analgesia: 0.1-0.3 mg/kg IV/IO (jinkirin turawa) | 0.5 mg/kg IM. Ƙwararren tsari: 1-2 mg / kg IV | 4-6 mg/kg IM. Gabatarwar RSI: 1-2 mg/kg IV.
contraindications: Sanin schizophrenia ko psychosis mai aiki
ICP mai girma ba tare da kariya ta iska ba (dangi)
warnings: Halayen gaggawa (delirium/hallucinations) -- rage tare da midazolam 1-2mg IV idan akwai.
Yana ƙara ɓarna -- a shirya tsotsa.
Laryngospasm ba kasafai bane amma mai yiwuwa - ci gaba da samun BVM.

pediatric.dose: Analgesia: 0.5 mg/kg IV. Ƙwararren tsari: 1-2 mg / kg IV | 4-5 mg/kg IM.
pediatric.note: Yayi karatu sosai a fannin ilimin yara. An fi so don hanyoyi masu raɗaɗi.

obstetric.note: Amintacce don ciwon ciwon ciki a ƙananan allurai. Zai iya haifar da baƙin ciki ga jariri a yawan allurai idan an kawo shi kusa da lokacin haihuwa.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / TCCC Guidelines
